title: hilleria subcordata
intro: Hilleria subcordata, a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hilleria subcordata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, among others. Hilleria subcordata is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
